name: draft-wireframe
description: | Wireframe a screen — text/ASCII by default, or hand-drawn HTML when the user says "sketch", "hand-drawn", "lo-fi HTML", "whiteboard", "graph paper", or "visual wireframe". Text mode produces a buildable ASCII spec Form and Prism can act on. HTML mode produces a single self-contained file with graph-paper background, marker headlines, sticky-note annotations, and hatched chart placeholders — looks like a designer's whiteboard, commits to nothing.
author: jeremylongshore
